title: Junior Frontend Developer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Consulting Pvt Ltd!
